description.ko: 유기적 세포 구조를 통해 흐르는 생체 발광 액체의 리듬감 있는 고동.
description.en: A rhythmic heartbeat of bioluminescent fluid moving through organic cellular structures.

prompt: An ultra-detailed cinematic 3D render of AURA-7, titled 'The Osmotic Pulse.' A rhythmic, breathing network of #7FB069 emerald membranes and #2D5A3D forest-green vascular structures. Fluid #E6F2E1 pearlescent sap flows through semi-permeable cellular walls, illuminated by #FFE66D golden bioluminescent pulses. Octane render, hyper-realistic fluid dynamics, volumetric light, soft focus bokeh, 8k resolution, organic motion.
